channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASAâs Cold Atom Lab is creating one of the weirdest forms of matter in space
item.description: NASA's upgraded Cold Atom Lab on the ISS is enabling quantum research by producing ultra-cold matter that behaves in unusual ways.

item.title: Scientists open a million-year-old time capsule hidden beneath New Zealand
item.description: A cave in New Zealand has yielded fossils from a lost ecosystem about 1 million years ago, possibly including a flying ancestor of the kÄkÄpÅ.

item.title: Meteorite hints at a lost moon-sized world from the early solar system
item.description: A rare meteorite suggests a massive lost world once orbited the young Sun before being destroyed in a collision.

item.title: Future astronauts may walk on rocks from deep inside the Moon
item.description: An ancient collision may have left deep lunar secrets near future Artemis landing sites, according to new simulations.
